name: resume-builder
description: Evidence-backed resume workspace tooling for targeted job searches.

scripts.sample:quickstart: npm run workspace:tracker -- --workspace examples/sample-candidate && npm run workspace:similar -- --workspace examples/sample-candidate --candidates examples/sample-candidate/roles.similar.candidates.json && npm run workspace:validate -- --workspace examples/sample-candidate
scripts.check: npm run check:workspace && npm run check:privacy
scripts.validate: npm run sample:quickstart && npm run check:privacy
